name: human-resource-management-system
description: Full-stack Human Resource Management System (HRMS) built with React, Node.js, Express, and SQLite.

scripts.setup: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: node -e "const { spawn } = require('child_process'); spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev'], { cwd: './backend', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev'], { cwd: './frontend', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true });"
